name: Google Media Tools
description: Nano Banana (image gen), Veo (video), Lyria (music), TTS for social media content

geminiApiKey.description: Google AI Studio API key for Gemini

defaultOutputDir.description: Root directory where generated assets and rendered videos are stored

dryRun.description: Generate and render assets without publishing side effects

killSwitch.description: Stop all automation when set to true

publicMediaBaseUrl.description: Optional public base URL that serves files under the managed output directory for live publishing

instagramAccessToken.description: Instagram Graph API access token for publishing and analytics

instagramBusinessAccountId.description: Instagram Business account ID used for publishing and analytics

instagramApiBaseUrl.description: Optional override for the Instagram Graph API base URL

tiktokAccessToken.description: TikTok API access token for publishing and analytics

tiktokCreatorId.description: TikTok creator ID used for publishing and analytics

tiktokApiBaseUrl.description: Optional override for the TikTok API base URL
